outline.title: Digzio Sprint 1 Complete
outline.summary: Title slide: Sprint 1 AWS Infrastructure Provisioning is complete. Region af-south-1 Cape Town. POPIA-compliant. Date 23 April 2026.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Sprint 1 at a Glance
outline.summary: High-level summary: 44 AWS resources provisioned, 11 database tables live, 9 ENUMs, PostGIS spatial search enabled, 2 CI/CD pipelines created. All acceptance criteria passed.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Infrastructure Architecture Deployed
outline.summary: Visual breakdown of the deployed AWS stack: VPC with 3 public + 3 private subnets across 3 AZs, NAT Gateway, RDS PostgreSQL 15, ElastiCache Redis 7, ECS Fargate Cluster, 2 S3 buckets.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Production Database Schema is Live
outline.summary: Migration applied: 11 tables (users, properties, applications, leases, payments, KYC, notifications, etc.), 9 ENUMs, PostGIS + uuid-ossp extensions, 27 indexes including spatial index on properties.location.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Security Posture: Zero Public Exposure
outline.summary: RDS PubliclyAccessible=false, database in private subnet, password stored in AWS Secrets Manager, S3 public access blocked, security groups restrict port 5432 to VPC CIDR only, bastion host terminated after migration.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: CI/CD Pipelines Ready to Activate
outline.summary: Two GitHub Actions workflows created: Frontend (Vite build → S3 deploy) and Backend (Docker build → ECR push → ECS deploy). Triggered on push to main. Awaiting GitHub repo URL and secrets.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: All Acceptance Criteria Passed
outline.summary: Checklist of all 8 Sprint 1 acceptance criteria — all green: VPC, RDS private, Redis, ECS, S3, SQL migration, CI/CD, resource tagging.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Sprint 2 Begins: Backend Microservices
outline.summary: Next sprint covers: ECR repo, Auth Service (JWT + RBAC), Property API, Image API, Notification Service (WhatsApp + SendGrid), Application Load Balancer, API Gateway + WAF. Two items needed from user: GitHub repo URL and GitHub Secrets.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed
